summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an intense Spring‑‘87 show highlighted by a spectacular first set featuring Desolation Row, Birdsong and Row Jimmy.
review: Fans rave about the crystal‑clear Charlie Miller soundboard tape, calling it an “excellent capture” with a great crowd mix. The performance is described as one of the best of the spring ’87 tour, with a standout first set – Desolation Row, Birdsong, Row Jimmy and a killer China > Rider sequence – and Jerry Garcia’s playing praised as his strongest since the early‑80s.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive (average 4.5 stars), praising both musical performance and recording quality; the consensus is consistent with no major criticisms.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note an excellent capture, crisp mix, and pleasant crowd blend; no technical complaints are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A high‑energy, intense show with a spectacular first set that builds into a powerful second half; reviewers describe the night as “intense” and “one of the best of spring ’87.”

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised – back in form and better than early‑80s performances.
